sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3503" key="a)krito/xeiros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκρῐτό-χειρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n3503.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with countless hands</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1342.tlg001:60" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Emp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">60</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
